---
comments: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    margin-top: 0em
    margin-bottom: 0em
    minimal: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    fig-responsive: true
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents:
    - "blog/youtube-channel/index.qmd"

  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 3
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title]

---






::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="html/landing_page_styles.css">

<div class="gradient_bg">
    <div class="hero section_padding">
        <div class="hero_content">
            <h1><span class="gradient_text">
                <i class="fas fa-house"></i>
                Joseph Salmon</span>
            <br> Machine learning & data science.</h1>
            <p>I am a statistician and an applied mathematician at Inria, with a strong interest in machine learning, optimization and data science. In terms of applications, I focus on <strong>citizen science</strong>, <strong>crowdsourcing</strong> and <strong>high dimensional statistics</strong>.</p>
            <h2>Short bio </h2>
            <p>From 2018 to 2024 I was a full professor at <a href="https://www.umontpellier.fr/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Université de Montpellier</span></a> and a Junior member of the <a href="http://www.iufrance.fr/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Institut Universitaire de France</span></a> (IUF), from 2021 to 2024.
            For the spring and summer quarters 2018, I was a visiting assistant professor at <a href="https://www.stat.washington.edu/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>UW, Statistics department</span></a>.
            From 2012 to 2018 I was an assistant professor at <a href="http://telecom-paris.fr">Telecom Paris</span></a> and an associate member at INRIA <a href="http://parietal.saclay.inria.fr/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Parietal Team </span></a> (now Mind Team).
            Back in 2011-2012, I was a post-doctoral Associate at <a href="https://www.duke.edu/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Duke university</span></a> working with <a href="https://voices.uchicago.edu/willett/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Rebecca Willett</span></a>.

            In 2010, I finished my Ph.D. in statistics and image processing under the supervision of Dominique Picard and <a href="http://www.cmap.polytechnique.fr/~lepennec/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Erwan Le Pennec</span></a> at the Laboratoire de Probabilités et de Modélisation Aléatoire, now <a href="http://isidore.lpma.math.upmc.fr/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>LPSM</span></a>, in <a href="https://www.univ-paris-diderot.fr/" target="_blank"><span style='text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>Université Paris Diderot</span></a>.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="hero_image">
            <img src="/img/joseph_2018.png"/>
        </div>
        <div id="dot_container">
        </div>
    </div>



<!-- 
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" version="1.1" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:svgjs="http://svgjs.dev/svgjs" viewBox="0 0 800 150" opacity="1"><defs><linearGradient gradientTransform="rotate(270)" x1="50%" y1="0%" x2="50%" y2="100%" id="sssquiggly-grad"><stop stop-color="hsl(44, 97%, 46%)" stop-opacity="1" offset="0%"></stop><stop stop-color="hsl(44, 97%, 46%)" stop-opacity="1" offset="100%"></stop></linearGradient></defs><g stroke-width="1.5" stroke="url(#sssquiggly-grad)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,-5,51.00748062133789)">
<path d="M10,10C31.726190476190478,11.666666666666666,68.75,24.666666666666664,114.28571428571429,18C159.82142857142858,11.333333333333334,180.95238095238096,-22.833333333333332,228.57142857142858,-22C276.1904761904762,-21.166666666666668,295.2380952380953,19.916666666666668,342.8571428571429,22C390.4761904761905,24.083333333333332,409.5238095238095,-14.916666666666668,457.14285714285717,-12C504.7619047619048,-9.083333333333332,523.8095238095239,33.708333333333336,571.4285714285714,36C619.047619047619,38.291666666666664,638.0952380952382,-1.8333333333333333,685.7142857142858,-1C733.3333333333334,-0.16666666666666674,776.1904761904761,31.458333333333336,800,40" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,0,50)"></path><path d="M10,10C31.726190476190478,11.666666666666666,68.75,24.666666666666664,114.28571428571429,18C159.82142857142858,11.333333333333334,180.95238095238096,-22.833333333333332,228.57142857142858,-22C276.1904761904762,-21.166666666666668,295.2380952380953,19.916666666666668,342.8571428571429,22C390.4761904761905,24.083333333333332,409.5238095238095,-14.916666666666668,457.14285714285717,-12C504.7619047619048,-9.083333333333332,523.8095238095239,33.708333333333336,571.4285714285714,36C619.047619047619,38.291666666666664,638.0952380952382,-1.8333333333333333,685.7142857142858,-1C733.3333333333334,-0.16666666666666674,776.1904761904761,31.458333333333336,800,40" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,0,40)"></path><path d="M10,10C31.726190476190478,11.666666666666666,68.75,24.666666666666664,114.28571428571429,18C159.82142857142858,11.333333333333334,180.95238095238096,-22.833333333333332,228.57142857142858,-22C276.1904761904762,-21.166666666666668,295.2380952380953,19.916666666666668,342.8571428571429,22C390.4761904761905,24.083333333333332,409.5238095238095,-14.916666666666668,457.14285714285717,-12C504.7619047619048,-9.083333333333332,523.8095238095239,33.708333333333336,571.4285714285714,36C619.047619047619,38.291666666666664,638.0952380952382,-1.8333333333333333,685.7142857142858,-1C733.3333333333334,-0.16666666666666674,776.1904761904761,31.458333333333336,800,40" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,0,30)"></path><path d="M10,10C31.726190476190478,11.666666666666666,68.75,24.666666666666664,114.28571428571429,18C159.82142857142858,11.333333333333334,180.95238095238096,-22.833333333333332,228.57142857142858,-22C276.1904761904762,-21.166666666666668,295.2380952380953,19.916666666666668,342.8571428571429,22C390.4761904761905,24.083333333333332,409.5238095238095,-14.916666666666668,457.14285714285717,-12C504.7619047619048,-9.083333333333332,523.8095238095239,33.708333333333336,571.4285714285714,36C619.047619047619,38.291666666666664,638.0952380952382,-1.8333333333333333,685.7142857142858,-1C733.3333333333334,-0.16666666666666674,776.1904761904761,31.458333333333336,800,40" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,0,20)"></path><path d="M10,10C31.726190476190478,11.666666666666666,68.75,24.666666666666664,114.28571428571429,18C159.82142857142858,11.333333333333334,180.95238095238096,-22.833333333333332,228.57142857142858,-22C276.1904761904762,-21.166666666666668,295.2380952380953,19.916666666666668,342.8571428571429,22C390.4761904761905,24.083333333333332,409.5238095238095,-14.916666666666668,457.14285714285717,-12C504.7619047619048,-9.083333333333332,523.8095238095239,33.708333333333336,571.4285714285714,36C619.047619047619,38.291666666666664,638.0952380952382,-1.8333333333333333,685.7142857142858,-1C733.3333333333334,-0.16666666666666674,776.1904761904761,31.458333333333336,800,40" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,0,10)"></path></g></svg> -->
<svg
   version="1.1"
   viewBox="0 0 800 150"
   opacity="1"
   id="svg21"
   sodipodi:docname="separation.svg"
   inkscape:version="1.2.2 (b0a8486541, 2022-12-01)"
   xmlns:inkscape="http://www.inkscape.org/namespaces/inkscape"
   xmlns:sodipodi="http://sodipodi.sourceforge.net/DTD/sodipodi-0.dtd"
   xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"
   xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
   xmlns:svg="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <sodipodi:namedview
     id="namedview23"
     pagecolor="#ffffff"
     bordercolor="#666666"
     borderopacity="1.0"
     inkscape:showpageshadow="2"
     inkscape:pageopacity="0.0"
     inkscape:pagecheckerboard="0"
     inkscape:deskcolor="#d1d1d1"
     showgrid="false"
     inkscape:zoom="0.78666667"
     inkscape:cx="357.20339"
     inkscape:cy="174.15254"
     inkscape:window-width="1474"
     inkscape:window-height="891"
     inkscape:window-x="0"
     inkscape:window-y="0"
     inkscape:window-maximized="1"
     inkscape:current-layer="figure_1" />
  <defs
     id="defs7">
    <linearGradient
       gradientTransform="rotate(270)"
       x1="50%"
       y1="0%"
       x2="50%"
       y2="100%"
       id="linearGradient9299">
      <stop
         stop-color="hsl(44, 97%, 46%)"
         stop-opacity="1"
         offset="0"
         id="stop9295"
         style="stop-color:#f08f04;stop-opacity:1;" />
      <stop
         stop-color="hsl(44, 97%, 46%)"
         stop-opacity="1"
         offset="100%"
         id="stop9297" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient
       gradientTransform="rotate(270)"
       x1="50%"
       y1="0%"
       x2="50%"
       y2="100%"
       id="sssquiggly-grad">
      <stop
         stop-color="hsl(44, 97%, 46%)"
         stop-opacity="1"
         offset="0%"
         id="stop2" />
      <stop
         stop-color="hsl(44, 97%, 46%)"
         stop-opacity="1"
         offset="100%"
         id="stop4" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient
       inkscape:collect="always"
       xlink:href="#sssquiggly-grad"
       id="linearGradient339"
       gradientTransform="scale(2.7651832,0.36163969)"
       x1="146.46407"
       y1="-35.297437"
       x2="146.46407"
       y2="250.94038"
       gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse" />
    <clipPath
       id="pe2a50c2641">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="0"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5664" />
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath
       id="p38b42140c6">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="43.829788"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5667" />
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath
       id="p22f92e264a">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="87.659576"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5670" />
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath
       id="pdb2ab1ddd3">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="131.48936"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5673" />
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath
       id="p283225d852">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="175.31915"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5676" />
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath
       id="pbc5bdf4439">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="219.14894"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5679" />
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath
       id="p91a9cb3bb2">
      <rect
         x="0"
         y="262.97873"
         width="2160"
         height="97.021278"
         id="rect5682" />
    </clipPath>
    <linearGradient
       inkscape:collect="always"
       xlink:href="#sssquiggly-grad"
       id="linearGradient6258"
       gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"
       gradientTransform="scale(2.7651832,0.36163969)"
       x1="146.46407"
       y1="-35.297437"
       x2="146.46407"
       y2="250.94038" />
  </defs>
  <g
     stroke-width="1.5"
     stroke="url(#sssquiggly-grad)"
     fill="none"
     stroke-linecap="round"
     transform="translate(-7,51.007481)"
     id="g19"
     style="stroke:url(#linearGradient339)">
    <g
       id="figure_1"
       style="stroke:url(#linearGradient6258);stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round"
       transform="matrix(0.36858785,0,0,0.40140416,9.7084977,-46.97277)">
      <g
         id="axes_1"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
        <g
           id="patch_2"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1" />
      </g>
      <g
         id="axes_4"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-238.47074,-7.9801211)">
        <g
           id="line2d_3"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 472.7538,169.9175 -1.4e-4,-0.16918 13.94137,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path5643"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="ccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
      <g
         id="g6531"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-190.96753,35.63956)">
        <g
           id="g6529"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 418.49256,169.9175 49.59987,-0.16918 18.6026,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path6527"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="ccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
      <g
         id="g6541"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-143.46434,79.259239)">
        <g
           id="g6539"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 364.23146,169.9667 79.05751,-0.0492 24.80346,-0.16918 18.6026,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path6537"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
      <g
         id="g6551"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-95.961186,122.87893)">
        <g
           id="g6549"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 309.97038,170.76855 27.90389,-0.23035 58.90822,-0.5715 46.50648,-0.0492 24.80346,-0.16918 18.6026,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path6547"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
      <g
         id="g6710"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-214.71913,13.829719)">
        <g
           id="g6708"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 472.7538,169.9175 -27.13069,-0.16918 41.07192,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path6706"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="ccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
      <g
         id="g6720"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-167.21592,57.449399)">
        <g
           id="g6718"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 391.36201,169.9175 76.73042,-0.16918 18.6026,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path6716"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="ccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
      <g
         id="g6730"
         style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
         transform="matrix(0.87545615,0,0,0.87545615,-114.96244,101.06908)">
        <g
           id="g6728"
           style="stroke:#f08f04;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1">
          <path
             d="m 331.6748,169.9667 111.61417,-0.0492 24.80346,-0.16918 18.6026,-0.32642 18.60259,-0.53746 18.6026,-0.75427 21.70302,-1.1326 21.70303,-1.3572 27.90389,-1.98114 27.90389,-2.18382 21.70303,-1.88432 18.6026,-1.84384 15.50216,-1.79091 12.40173,-1.66289 12.40173,-1.92207 9.3013,-1.64291 9.30129,-1.83933 9.3013,-2.0556 9.3013,-2.28908 9.30129,-2.53575 9.3013,-2.78997 9.3013,-3.04426 9.3013,-3.28922 9.30129,-3.51358 12.40173,-4.97429 15.50216,-6.51228 18.6026,-7.81902 9.3013,-3.71503 9.30129,-3.46451 6.20087,-2.12617 6.20086,-1.94998 6.20087,-1.750625 6.20086,-1.530519 6.20087,-1.292544 6.20086,-1.03999 6.20087,-0.77648 6.20086,-0.505865 6.20087,-0.232151 6.20086,0.04063 6.20087,0.308481 6.20086,0.567592 6.20087,0.814399 6.20086,1.045685 6.20087,1.258666 6.20086,1.451042 6.20087,1.621056 9.30129,2.698623 9.3013,2.94635 12.40173,4.1746 34.10472,11.64248 12.4018,3.91182 9.3013,2.73659 9.3013,2.54528 9.3013,2.34295 9.3013,2.13728 9.3013,1.93544 9.3013,1.74418 12.4017,2.0579 12.4017,1.80283 15.5022,1.99674 27.9039,3.28062 34.1047,4.09098 31.0043,3.70585 15.5022,1.65027 15.5022,1.43483 15.5021,1.21725 18.6026,1.24138 65.1091,4.13018 43.4061,2.92764 18.6026,1.02576 18.6026,0.79075 18.6025,0.54122 18.6026,0.31604 24.8035,0.16744 68.2095,0.26506 34.1048,0.46372 55.8078,0.77928 37.2051,0.2531 52.7074,0.0972 244.9342,0.0101 H 2161 v 0"
             clip-path="url(#p22f92e264a)"
             style="fill:none;stroke:#f08f04;stroke-width:5;stroke-linecap:square;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-opacity:1"
             id="path6726"
             sodipodi:nodetypes="cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc" />
        </g>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>


</div>


<script src="html/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script src="html/TweenMax.min.js"></script>
```

:::


:::{#news}
## News

- **July 8, 2024**: I started a YouTube channel! The videos will broadly fall into these categories: Early career research based on my experience, technical machine learning topics, applied programming in R and Python. In my first video, I talk about my background and my plans for the channel: {{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5Z9yNEgbbfU
    title="I started a YouTube channel!"
    aspect-ratio="16x9" >}}

- **June 6, 2024**: My guest episode on the [Learning Bayesian Statistics](https://learnbayesstats.com/) podcast is live. We had a great conversation about my research on amortized Bayesian inference with neural networks. Here's the announcement post on [Twitter](https://x.com/MarvinSchmittML/status/1798708954769641638) and [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7204469302513602560/).


:::{#contact}
## Contact

If you want to connect please reach out via email
<a href="mailto:joseph.salmon@inria.fr"><span style='text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: #f08f04ff;'>joseph.salmon@inria.fr</span></a>
or Mastodon.

You can also write or visit me:

IMAG, c.c. 051</br>
Université de Montpellier</br>
Place Eugène Bataillon</br>
34095 Montpellier Cedex 5</br>
(office 415, building 9)</br>


:::

<!--
- **March 20, 2023**: We are hiring a student assistant to help with software development for probabilistic machine learning, 5-10h/week. <a href="student_assistant_software_engineering_ml/index.html" target="_blank" style="color: #f08f04ff;">Here</a> is a link to the advertisement. <a href="mailto:mail.marvinschmitt@gmail.com?subject=Student assistant ML software engineering" target="_blank" style="color: #f08f04ff;">Drop me a mail</a> if you're interested!

- **March 10, 2023**: Heading to [BayesComp 2023](https://bayescomp2023.com/) in Levi, Finland. Finally putting faces to all those names from papers and Twitter. Presenting a [poster](projects/poster_bayescomp_mms.pdf) and an invited lightning talk. See you around! -->

<!-- - **01.12.2021**: I have started working as a PhD researcher in Paul Buerkner's Junior Research Group for Bayesian Statistics at the Cluster of Excellence SimTech (University of Stuttgart). Excited to do hands-on research on Bayesian Statistics and Probabilistic Machine Learning! -->



## Featured Blog Posts
:::{#blog-listing}
:::
